hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[^a-zA-Z])(grep|rg)([^a-zA-Z]|$)' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'ast-grep'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: CLAUDE.md rule - prefer ast-grep over grep/rg for code searches. Only use grep/rg for non-code files (logs, configs, docs)."}}'; fi

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: CLAUDE.md rule - prefer ast-grep for code searches. Only use the Grep tool for non-code files (logs, configs, docs)."}}'

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: CLAUDE.md requires spawning the orchestrate-analyze subagent for any code change (writes/modifies/refactors). If this edit is exploration, a plan file, docs, or settings, proceed. Otherwise stop and delegate to orchestrate-analyze."}}'
